category_sources: source_facts.description says debug versions of system memory management routines; official dmalloc homepage describes a debug memory allocation library with memory debugging facilities.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses Dmalloc - Debug Malloc Library; source_facts.name is dmalloc.
docs_sources: Official dmalloc homepage links Getting Started, Full, and PDF documentation.
repo_sources: Official dmalloc homepage links Github sources; GitHub README identifies the Debug Malloc Library.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable; official homepage and GitHub README describe malloc/realloc/calloc/free replacement, leak tracking, fence-post detection, logging, utility app, and documentation.
